revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-4-135

Device fitted to a buoy or Lanby to reduce the amplitude of rolling motion.


Note:

Various devices used include :

*the tail tube

*the skirt

*the stabilising ring

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Roll damping device}}
